assertionResults.title: Status indicators are 6x6 squares
assertionResults.reason: All audited indicators retained 6x6 size and 0px border-radius, but dashboard includes 6x6 square indicators with non-contract colors (#EF4444, #F97316, #EAB308, #6B7280, #3B82F6) instead of only alive #82E88A, dead #FF6060, or idle transparent+border.

steps.action: Open Dashboard, Agents, Issues, and one Issue Detail page in read-only mode
steps.expected: Representative status indicators visible for inspection
steps.observed: Pages loaded and status indicator candidates were visible/auditable.

steps.action: Capture annotated screenshots on each view
steps.expected: Visual evidence for indicator shape and placement
steps.observed: Annotated screenshots captured for dashboard, agents, issues, and issue detail.

steps.action: Run computed-style audits for 6x6 square indicator candidates and aggregate results
steps.expected: All candidates use allowed status colors and square geometry
steps.observed: Aggregate audit found 5 color violations across 11 candidates (violations concentrated on dashboard legend chips).

assertionResults.issues: Dashboard 6x6 indicators labeled Critical/High/Medium/Low/To Do use non-contract colors, causing VAL-GUI-FOUND-004 failure under computed-style audit.

frictions.description: agent-browser `get html @ref` did not accept snapshot refs in this run (selector parsing error), so style evidence relied on `eval` computed-style audits.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser eval` scripts to extract computed styles directly from DOM.
